summary: Completed issue 078 post-V5 live hardening. Repository memory now marks the first V5 live pilot as complete, issue 076 scope is no longer active, execute-runtime-launch writes bounded redacted failure_diagnostics for new runtime execution artifacts, runtime execution validation and schema document the diagnostics object, and v5-live-status reports the completed live pilot, slice outcomes, coordinator remediation, readiness state, diagnostics coverage, and next recommended action.
policy_result: Passed. The task stayed inside the issue 078 execution contract and scope manifest. It did not launch live Claude Code or Antigravity sessions. It did not access protected credentials, touch production, install dependencies, change authentication, authorization, billing, database, CI/CD security, or deployment automation.
risk_result: Medium risk. The CLI artifact contract changed by adding optional failure_diagnostics, with validator and schema coverage. Historical runtime execution artifacts remain valid without diagnostics. Remaining product risk is live CLI executor autonomy, because issue 076 required coordinator remediation after two failed live implementation attempts.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
The next serious live pilot still needs to prove live implementation, test, and documentation slices without coordinator remediation.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, deterministic review gate, and required merge gates.
